sections.title: If the player has previously taken a toy from the monkey child

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: I'm good, uncle! I'd quite like my toy back now...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost that toy you gave me...

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: You lost it!? What am I going to play with now?

sections.title: If enough time has passed or the player has logged in and out after taking the toy

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: I'm feeling a bit better now...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's good to see you've cheered up then.

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: Yes - Aunty gave me a new toy!

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: Only if you promise to give it back...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't really need it.

sections.title: Using the monkey talisman on the monkey child
Using another monkey talisman on the monkey child

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: Thank you uncle, but I don't want one!

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: Thank you uncle - I love you!

sections.title: Using any enchanted greegree on the monkey child

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: I don't want that - it looks really scary!

sections.title: Using any other item on the monkey child

lines.speaker: Monkey Child
lines.text: I have no use for that.
